title: salvia lavandulifolia var. trichostachya
intro: Salvia lavandulifolia var. trichostachya, also known as Red Sage, is a variant of the Salvia lavandulifolia plant, a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and promoting a restful sleep. Red Sage can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal preparations to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
